ab: aip tu cinpitu, kusian a saikin pasnanavaan.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: na’isnavaanin, kusianin a masnanava sian pasnanavaan, at tushit a lavian tu, “minduldula! pissauk!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: masa isnavaanin hai, isnavaan a kaimin mas malisBunun tu issisipul.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the ethnic language of numbers.

ab: tususulut a kaimin mas masnanavacia masipul, at kahuzas a kaimin mas huzassipul.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: uhansiapan a saikin mas supah ituBunun tu halinga.
en: I have learned many ethnic languages.

ab: kaupahanian a saikin kusian mas pasnanavaan.
en: I go to school every day,

ab: kaupahanian a saikin mapasnava mas malisBunun.
en: I learn the ethnic language every day
and I want to tell my mother.
